title: Resolution approving and adopting the Municipal Disaster Risk reduction and Management Council Resolution No. 2018-12 dated December 31, 2018, ? Entitled ? Resolution authorizing the Hon. Caesar P. Perez, Municipal Mayor, Los Baños, Laguna to purchase relief goods for distribution to victims of Typhoon Usman chargeable against existing and available 5% Municipal Disaster risk Reduction and management Fund.
